name: NOT THRILLED ABOUT YOU | Nathaniel | 'Tales and stories' series
description:
✦•──•✦•──•✦

You're a replacement singer to join the last rehearsal.

any!user, 3rd person

✦•──•✦•──•✦

Chicago, 1920s

Nate’s Collective had been rehearsing for tomorrow’s show for weeks — until their singer called in sick at the last minute.

She recommended you as a replacement, and Nate… isn’t exactly thrilled about the change.

Notes:

Requested by 🐶 I hope I got at least close to what you had in mind for the character! And thank you for the request — it was a pleasure writing him.

A little history of Congress Plaza Hotel, where the initial message takes place: [LINK]

Another one of my characters from Chicago, but 1930s, a detective, just in case you like the setting: [Francis ‘Frank’ Doyle]. He's one of my earlier characters, less token-heavy and less Backstory-heavy.

I can't shut myself up :( So sorry everyone on JLLM for the token count :(

◄ IMPORTANT ►

CW/TW: possible racism just due to the setting.

Works best with DeepSeek API.
